message:
test(unit): expand restore_process.rs inline tests (21→86) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

+65 new tests covering: LaunchConfig defaults/serde/clone, LaunchAction
tagged enum serde roundtrips (all 4 variants), equality, ProcessPlan/
LaunchResult/LaunchReport serde roundtrips, normalize_cwd edge cases
(bare path, triple slash, hostname, multiple percent, root, empty),
percent_decode edge cases (empty, no-op, space, multiple, special chars,
invalid hex, trailing/incomplete), shell_escape special chars ($, backtick,
!, &, #, quotes, parens, tilde, backslash), is_shell comprehensive (all
10 names, paths, rejects), is_interactive_program comprehensive (all 24
names, paths, rejects), agent_type_from_process_name (all names, paths,
unknowns), parse_agent_type (all variants, unknowns), default_agent_command
(gemini, wezterm/unknown none, path escaping), resolve_action edge cases
(no info+shells disabled, foreground shell, unknown process with/without
argv, no cwd defaults root, codex/gemini agent detection, unknown agent
type, state warning content), execute scenarios (empty, skip-only,
manual-only, agent launch, result order preservation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
